news: Bicycle Therapeutics provided updates on its EphA2 pipeline at AACR 2026, including Phase 1 combination data for nuzefatide pevedotin with nivolumab, preclinical data in pancreatic ductal adenocarcinoma and head and neck squamous cell carcinoma models, and human imaging data supporting EphA2 as a cancer target.

changes.reason: Phase 1 combination data presented at AACR validates EphA2 target and shows nuzefatide activity in combination with checkpoint inhibitor
Strong preclinical data in multiple tumor types (PDAC, HNSCC) plus human imaging validation significantly de-risks EphA2 as druggable target
Even in conservative scenario, presentation of actual clinical data and target validation warrants modest increase

news: Corvus will present Phase 1 soquelitinib data including immunologic and biomarker findings at investor meeting on May 14, 2026.

changes.reason: Immunologic and biomarker findings supporting potential for drug-free remissions indicate stronger mechanistic understanding and differentiation for AD indication
Additional biomarker validation data strengthens bull case confidence in AD mechanism

news: Ionis presented additional positive zilganersen data for Alexander disease from pivotal study showing significant gait speed stabilization and 33.3% improvement, meeting primary endpoint.

changes.reason: Additional positive pivotal data with statistical significance and 33.3% gait speed improvement strengthens probability of success
Consistent positive data across scenarios supports modest increase in bear case probability
Strong pivotal data meeting primary endpoint with statistical significance supports higher bull case probability

news: Galmed announces brain-penetrating nanoparticle Aramchol for Parkinson's disease with proof-of-concept Phase 1b/2 trial planned for H2 2026.

changes.reason: Brain-penetrating LNP formulation represents meaningful technical advancement over oral Aramchol, increasing probability of success in Parkinson's indication
Novel brain-penetrant delivery mechanism with Barcode Nanotech partnership enhances bull case probability for Parkinson's program
Even in bear case, brain-penetrating formulation announcement provides modest probability uplift versus previous oral-only approach

news: Revolution Medicines presented phase 1 clinical data for zoldonrasib in KRAS G12D NSCLC patients at AACR 2026.

changes.reason: Positive phase 1 NSCLC data presentation increases probability of success
Strong phase 1 data supports bull case assumptions for G12D program
